snippets:
[
    // Overline
    {trigger: "^^", replacement: "overline($0)", options: "mA"},

    // Math mode
    {trigger: "mk", replacement: "$$0$", options: "tA"},
    {trigger: "dm", replacement: "$ $\n$0\n$ $", options: "tAw"},

    // Greek letters - Typst 直接写名称，保留快捷触发
    {trigger: "@a", replacement: "alpha", options: "mA"},
    {trigger: "@b", replacement: "beta", options: "mA"},
    {trigger: "@g", replacement: "gamma", options: "mA"},
    {trigger: "@G", replacement: "Gamma", options: "mA"},
    {trigger: "@d", replacement: "delta", options: "mA"},
    {trigger: "@D", replacement: "Delta", options: "mA"},
    {trigger: "@e", replacement: "epsilon", options: "mA"},
    {trigger: ":e", replacement: "epsilon.alt", options: "mA"},
    {trigger: "@z", replacement: "zeta", options: "mA"},
    {trigger: "@t", replacement: "theta", options: "mA"},
    {trigger: "@T", replacement: "Theta", options: "mA"},
    {trigger: ":t", replacement: "theta.alt", options: "mA"},
    {trigger: "@i", replacement: "iota", options: "mA"},
    {trigger: "@k", replacement: "kappa", options: "mA"},
    {trigger: "@l", replacement: "lambda", options: "mA"},
    {trigger: "@L", replacement: "Lambda", options: "mA"},
    {trigger: "@s", replacement: "sigma", options: "mA"},
    {trigger: "@S", replacement: "Sigma", options: "mA"},
    {trigger: "@u", replacement: "upsilon", options: "mA"},
    {trigger: "@U", replacement: "Upsilon", options: "mA"},
    {trigger: "@o", replacement: "omega", options: "mA"},
    {trigger: "@O", replacement: "Omega", options: "mA"},
    {trigger: "ome", replacement: "omega", options: "mA"},
    {trigger: "Ome", replacement: "Omega", options: "mA"},

    // Text in math - Typst 用双引号
    {trigger: "text", replacement: "\"$0\"$1", options: "mA"},
    {trigger: "\"", replacement: "\"$0\"$1", options: "mA"},

    // Basic operations - Typst 用 () 分组，单字符无需括号
    {trigger: "sr", replacement: "^2", options: "mA"},
    {trigger: "cb", replacement: "^3", options: "mA"},
    {trigger: "rd", replacement: "^($0)$1", options: "mA"},
    {trigger: "_", replacement: "_($0)$1", options: "mA"},
    {trigger: "sts", replacement: "_(\"$0\")", options: "mA"},
    {trigger: "sq", replacement: "sqrt($0)$1", options: "mA"},
    {trigger: "ee", replacement: "e^($0)$1", options: "mA"},
    {trigger: "invs", replacement: "^(-1)", options: "mA"},
    {trigger: /([A-Za-z])(\d)/, replacement: "[[0]]_[[1]]", options: "rmA", description: "Auto letter subscript", priority: -1},

    {trigger: /([^a-zA-Z])(exp|log|ln)/, replacement: "[[0]] [[1]]", options: "rmA"},
    {trigger: "conj", replacement: "^*", options: "mA"},
    {trigger: "Re", replacement: "Re", options: "mA"},
    {trigger: "Im", replacement: "Im", options: "mA"},
    {trigger: "bf", replacement: "bold($0)", options: "mA"},
    {trigger: "rm", replacement: "upright($0)$1", options: "mA"},

    // Linear algebra
    {trigger: /([^a-zA-Z])(det)/, replacement: "[[0]] [[1]]", options: "rmA"},
    {trigger: "trace", replacement: "Tr", options: "mA"},

    // Accents - Typst 用函数形式，arrow 是向量箭头，vec 是列向量
    {trigger: "([a-zA-Z])hat", replacement: "hat([[0]])", options: "rmA"},
    {trigger: "([a-zA-Z])bar", replacement: "overline([[0]])", options: "rmA"},
    //{trigger: "([a-zA-Z])dot", replacement: "dot([[0]])", options: "rmA", priority: -1},
    {trigger: "([a-zA-Z])ddot", replacement: "ddot([[0]])", options: "rmA", priority: 1},
    {trigger: "([a-zA-Z])tilde", replacement: "tilde([[0]])", options: "rmA"},
    {trigger: "([a-zA-Z])und", replacement: "underline([[0]])", options: "rmA"},
    {trigger: "([a-zA-Z])vec", replacement: "arrow([[0]])", options: "rmA"},
    {trigger: "([a-zA-Z]),\\.", replacement: "bold([[0]])", options: "rmA"},
    {trigger: "([a-zA-Z])\\.,", replacement: "bold([[0]])", options: "rmA"},

    {trigger: "hat", replacement: "hat($0)$1", options: "mA"},
    {trigger: "bar", replacement: "overline($0)$1", options: "mA"},
    // {trigger: "dot", replacement: "dot($0)$1", options: "mA", priority: -1},
    {trigger: "ddot", replacement: "ddot($0)$1", options: "mA"},
    {trigger: "cdot", replacement: "dot", options: "mA"},
    {trigger: "tilde", replacement: "tilde($0)$1", options: "mA"},
    {trigger: "und", replacement: "underline($0)$1", options: "mA"},
    {trigger: "vec", replacement: "arrow($0)$1", options: "mA"},
    {trigger: "colvec", replacement: "vec($0)$1", options: "mA"},

    // Auto letter subscript
    {trigger: /([A-Za-z])_(\d\d)/, replacement: "[[0]]_([[1]])", options: "rmA"},
    {trigger: /hat\(([A-Za-z])\)(\d)/, replacement: "hat([[0]])_[[1]]", options: "rmA"},
    {trigger: /arrow\(([A-Za-z])\)(\d)/, replacement: "arrow([[0]])_[[1]]", options: "rmA"},
    {trigger: /bold\(([A-Za-z])\)(\d)/, replacement: "bold([[0]])_[[1]]", options: "rmA"},

    {trigger: "xnn", replacement: "x_n", options: "mA"},
    {trigger: "xii", replacement: "x_i", options: "mA", priority: 1},
    {trigger: "xjj", replacement: "x_j", options: "mA"},
    {trigger: "xp1", replacement: "x_(n+1)", options: "mA"},
    {trigger: "ynn", replacement: "y_n", options: "mA"},
    {trigger: "yii", replacement: "y_i", options: "mA"},
    {trigger: "yjj", replacement: "y_j", options: "mA"},

    // Symbols - Typst 语法
    {trigger: "ooo", replacement: "infinity", options: "mA"},
    {trigger: "sum", replacement: "sum", options: "mA"},
    {trigger: "prod", replacement: "product", options: "mA"},
    {trigger: "sum", replacement: "sum_(${0:i}=${1:1})^(${2:N}) $3", options: "m"},
    {trigger: "product", replacement: "product_(${0:i}=${1:1})^(${2:N}) $3", options: "m"},
    {trigger: "lim", replacement: "lim_(${0:n} arrow.r ${1:infinity}) $2", options: "mA"},
    {trigger: "+-", replacement: "plus.minus", options: "mA"},
    {trigger: "-+", replacement: "minus.plus", options: "mA"},
    {trigger: "...", replacement: "dots", options: "mA"},
    {trigger: "xx", replacement: "times", options: "mA"},
    {trigger: "**", replacement: "dot", options: "mA"},
    {trigger: "para", replacement: "parallel", options: "mA"},

    {trigger: "===", replacement: "equiv", options: "mA"},
    // {trigger: "!=", replacement: "neq", options: "mA"},
    {trigger: ">=", replacement: "geq", options: "mA"},
    {trigger: "<=", replacement: "leq", options: "mA"},
    {trigger: ">>", replacement: "gg", options: "mA"},
    {trigger: "<<", replacement: "ll", options: "mA"},
    {trigger: "simm", replacement: "tilde.op", options: "mA"},
    {trigger: "sim=", replacement: "approx.equi", options: "mA"},
    {trigger: "prop", replacement: "prop", options: "mA"},

    {trigger: "<->", replacement: "arrow.l.r ", options: "mA"},
    {trigger: "->", replacement: "arrow.r", options: "mA"},
    {trigger: "!>", replacement: "maps.to", options: "mA"},
    {trigger: "=>", replacement: "implies", options: "mA"},
    {trigger: "=<", replacement: "impliedby", options: "mA"},

    {trigger: "and", replacement: "intersection", options: "mA"},
    {trigger: "orr", replacement: "union", options: "mA"},
    {trigger: "inn", replacement: "in", options: "mA"},
    {trigger: "notin", replacement: "notin", options: "mA"},
    {trigger: "\\\\\\", replacement: "setminus", options: "mA"},
    {trigger: "sub=", replacement: "subset.eq", options: "mA"},
    {trigger: "sup=", replacement: "supset.eq", options: "mA"},
    {trigger: "eset", replacement: "nothing", options: "mA"},
    {trigger: "set", replacement: "set($0)$1", options: "mA"},
    {trigger: "e\\xi sts", replacement: "exists", options: "mA", priority: 1},

    // Calligraphic and blackboard letters
    {trigger: "LL", replacement: "cal(L)", options: "mA"},
    {trigger: "HH", replacement: "cal(H)", options: "mA"},
    {trigger: "CC", replacement: "bb(C)", options: "mA"},
    {trigger: "RR", replacement: "bb(R)", options: "mA"},
    {trigger: "ZZ", replacement: "bb(Z)", options: "mA"},
    {trigger: "NN", replacement: "bb(N)", options: "mA"},

    // Derivatives and integrals
{trigger: "par", replacement: "(partial ${0:y}) / (partial ${1:x}) $2", options: "m"},
{trigger: /pa([A-Za-z])([A-Za-z])/, replacement: "(partial [[0]]) / (partial [[1]]) ", options: "rm"},
    {trigger: "ddt", replacement: "(d)/(d t) ", options: "mA"},

    {trigger: /([^a-zA-Z])int/, replacement: "[[0]] integral", options: "mA", priority: -1},
    {trigger: "int", replacement: "integral $0 dif ${1:x} $2", options: "m"},
    {trigger: "dint", replacement: "integral_(${0:0})^(${1:1}) $2 dif ${3:x} $4", options: "mA"},
    {trigger: "oint", replacement: "integral.cont", options: "mA"},
    {trigger: "iint", replacement: "integral.double", options: "mA"},
    {trigger: "iiint", replacement: "integral.triple", options: "mA"},
    {trigger: "oinf", replacement: "integral_0^(infinity) $0 dif ${1:x} $2", options: "mA"},
    {trigger: "infi", replacement: "integral_(-infinity)^(+infinity) $0 dif ${1:x} $2", options: "mA"},

    // Trigonometry - Typst 不需要反斜杠
    {trigger: /([^a-zA-Z])(arcsin|sin|arccos|cos|arctan|tan|csc|sec|cot)/, replacement: "[[0]] [[1]]", options: "rmA", description: "Add space before trig funcs"},

    {trigger: /(arcsin|sin|arccos|cos|arctan|tan|csc|sec|cot)([A-Za-gi-z])/,
     replacement: "[[0]] [[1]]", options: "rmA",
     description: "Add space after trig funcs. Skips letter h to allow sinh, cosh, etc."},

    {trigger: /(sinh|cosh|tanh|coth)([A-Za-z])/,
     replacement: "[[0]] [[1]]", options: "rmA",
     description: "Add space after hyperbolic trig funcs"},

    // Visual operations
    {trigger: "U", replacement: "underbrace(${VISUAL}, _ $0)", options: "mA"},
    {trigger: "O", replacement: "overbrace(${VISUAL}, ^ $0)", options: "mA"},
    {trigger: "B", replacement: "underbrace($0, ${VISUAL})", options: "mA"},
    {trigger: "C", replacement: "cancel(${VISUAL})", options: "mA"},
    {trigger: "K", replacement: "cancel.to($0, ${VISUAL})", options: "mA"},
    {trigger: "S", replacement: "sqrt(${VISUAL})", options: "mA"},

    // Physics
    {trigger: "kbt", replacement: "k_B T", options: "mA"},
    {trigger: "msun", replacement: "M_(odot)", options: "mA"},

    // Quantum mechanics
    {trigger: "dag", replacement: "^(dagger)", options: "mA"},
    {trigger: "o+", replacement: "oplus ", options: "mA"},
    {trigger: "ox", replacement: "otimes ", options: "mA"},
    {trigger: "bra", replacement: "angle.l $0 angle.r $1", options: "mA"},
    {trigger: "ket", replacement: "angle.l $0 angle.r $1", options: "mA"},
    {trigger: "brk", replacement: "angle.l $0 mid $1 angle.r $2", options: "mA"},
    {trigger: "outer", replacement: "angle.l ${0:psi} angle.r angle.l ${0:psi} angle.r $1", options: "mA"},

    // Matrices - Typst 用 mat() 函数
    {trigger: "pmat", replacement: "mat(\n  $0\n)", options: "MA"},
    {trigger: "bmat", replacement: "mat(\n  delimiter: \"[\",\n  $0\n)", options: "MA"},
    {trigger: "Bmat", replacement: "mat(\n  delimiter: \"(\",\n  $0\n)", options: "MA"},
    {trigger: "vmat", replacement: "mat(\n  delimiter: \"|\",\n  $0\n)", options: "MA"},
    {trigger: "Vmat", replacement: "mat(\n  delimiter: \"||\",\n  $0\n)", options: "MA"},
    {trigger: "matrix", replacement: "mat(\n  $0\n)", options: "MA"},

    {trigger: "pmat", replacement: "mat($0)", options: "nA"},
    {trigger: "bmat", replacement: "mat(delimiter: \"[\", $0)", options: "nA"},
    {trigger: "Bmat", replacement: "mat(delimiter: \"(\", $0)", options: "nA"},
    {trigger: "vmat", replacement: "mat(delimiter: \"|\", $0)", options: "nA"},
    {trigger: "Vmat", replacement: "mat(delimiter: \"||\", $0)", options: "nA"},
    {trigger: "matrix", replacement: "mat($0)", options: "nA"},

    {trigger: "cases", replacement: "cases(\n  $0\n)", options: "mA"},
    {trigger: "align", replacement: "$0", options: "mA"},

    // Brackets
    {trigger: "avg", replacement: "angle.l $0 angle.r $1", options: "mA"},
    {trigger: "norm", replacement: "abs($0)$1", options: "mA", priority: 1},
    {trigger: "Norm", replacement: "norm($0)$1", options: "mA", priority: 1},
    {trigger: "ceil", replacement: "ceil($0)$1", options: "mA"},
    {trigger: "floor", replacement: "floor($0)$1", options: "mA"},
    {trigger: "mod", replacement: "|$0|$1", options: "mA"},
    {trigger: "(", replacement: "(${VISUAL})", options: "mA"},
    {trigger: "[", replacement: "[${VISUAL}]", options: "mA"},
    {trigger: "{", replacement: "(${VISUAL})", options: "mA"},
    {trigger: "(", replacement: "($0)$1", options: "mA"},
    {trigger: "{", replacement: "($0)$1", options: "mA"},
    {trigger: "[", replacement: "[$0]$1", options: "mA"},
    {trigger: "lr(", replacement: "lr($0) $1", options: "mA"},
    {trigger: "lr{", replacement: "lr($0) $1", options: "mA"},
    {trigger: "lr[", replacement: "lr[$0] $1", options: "mA"},
    {trigger: "lr|", replacement: "lr(|$0|) $1", options: "mA"},
    {trigger: "lra", replacement: "lr(angle.l $0 angle.r) $1", options: "mA"},

    // Identity matrix function
    {trigger: /iden(\d)/, replacement: (match) => {
        const n = match[1];
        let arr = [];
        for (let j = 0; j < n; j++) {
            arr[j] = [];
            for (let i = 0; i < n; i++) {
                arr[j][i] = (i === j) ? 1 : 0;
            }
        }
        // Typst mat syntax: rows separated by ;
        let output = arr.map(el => el.join(", ")).join("; ");
        output = `mat(${output})`;
        return output;
    }, options: "mA", description: "N x N identity matrix"},
]
matrixShortcutsEnvNames: pmatrix, cases, align, gather, bmatrix, Bmatrix, vmatrix, Vmatrix, array, matrix
autoEnlargeBracketsTriggers: sum, int, frac, prod, bigcup, bigcap
